title: Expense Tracker canvas app — governed software artifact
statement: The Expense Tracker canvas app must be registered as an approved software artifact with DLP-enforced connectors, Dataverse backend in the production environment, and no connections to unapproved SaaS.
controlObjective: Treat each Power App as a first-class ICT software asset under the Software pillar with full CoE lifecycle traceability.
acceptanceCriteria: App registered in asset register with assetClass software-power-platform-app
DLP policy blocks consumer connectors in production environment
Owner assigned and business justification documented in CoE
Solution exported and version-controlled for rollback
